items.title: Big Tech crash, oil volatility rattles markets: Will Bitcoin hold above $60K?
items.summary: With $1.9 billion exiting the spot Bitcoin ETFs and tech stocks under pressure, BTC is failing as a hedge and at risk of falling below the $60,000 support.

items.title: Three signs that XRP price risks falling below $1 in June
items.summary: XRP is forming head-and-shoulders and bear flag setups on its shorter-timeframe chart, both indicating a dip below $1 in the coming days.

items.title: AI researcher claims he's already bypassed Anthropic's Fable 5 guardrails
items.summary: “Pliny the Liberator,” says he has been “cleverly finding the holes in the fence that the thought police missed,” in the newly launched Fable 5.

items.title: There's one simple way to tell whether bitcoin has really bottomed. Right now, it hasn't.
items.summary: Bitcoin's weekly RSI contains a critical level that has reliably separated bull and bear market regimes across multiple cycles. Right now, the indicator has yet to clear that line.

items.title: XRP jumps 3% above $1.14 as institutional buying meets key resistance test
items.summary: XRP posted its strongest session in days on a sharp volume surge, though traders remain focused on whether the rally can break a longer-term downtrend that still points lower.

items.title: Live updates: Bitcoin traders eye rally to $75,000, Japan set to hike rates to 31-year high
items.summary: Crypto firmed across the board on the largest listing in history, but the token most tied to Elon Musk traded right in line with the market.

items.title: Former SEC, CFTC Chair Gary Gensler argues that prediction markets don't overrule state regulations
items.summary: The former regulator joined a number of interest groups in arguing that prediction markets are overstepping their bounds by offering sports-related contracts.

items.title: SpaceX's crypto-traded IPO was sharply falling. It now points upward to a $2.4 trillion valuation
items.summary: The SPCX perpetual on Hyperliquid has bounced from this week’s lows, while Bloomberg says other shadow markets now imply a first-day gain of more than 35%.

items.title: The company that makes your TV is taking ads onchain. Arbitrum helped
items.summary: LG Electronics has built a blockchain-based advertising platform with the help of Arbitrum.

items.title: Bitcoin climbs back into the green as Trump signals an end to the Iran war
items.summary: A de-escalation in the Iran conflict pulled oil lower and sent global stocks higher, lifting crypto out of a wildly volatile seven days.

items.title: International sting shuts down $390M crypto money-laundering ring
items.summary: Eleven countries were involved in the joint operation that ended the AudiA6 crypto laundering ring and Dark2Web marketplace.

items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

items.title: SEC plan to scrap ‘Rule 611’ positive for tokenized US stocks: Galaxy
items.summary: Galaxy’s Alex Thorn says a plan to scrap rules on stock orders and quotes would remove a major barrier to tokenized stocks trading on decentralized platforms.

items.title: LG, Arbitrum launch blockchain-based bid in $679B ad market
items.summary: LG is building a blockchain focused on buying and selling ads, joining a wave of companies launching their own blockchains in recent years.

items.title: Coinbase launches tool letting AI agents make payments and trade crypto
items.summary: Coinbase for Agents will allow users of the crypto exchange to manage their holdings without "constant manual oversight,” autonomously performing a range of tasks.

items.title: Avalanche Treasury falls 16% as it debuts on Nasdaq
items.summary: Avalanche Treasury holds about 15 million of the blockchain’s native token, AVAX, which is trading at a five-year low.

items.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX prices shares at $135, raising $75 billion in largest-ever IPO
items.summary: The company's fully diluted value will be about $1.8 trillion, with the stock set to open for trade on Friday on the Nasdaq.

items.title: Coinbase launches AI agent accounts that can trade and spend on your behalf
items.summary: "Coinbase for Agents" is a new platform that lets AI assistants like ChatGPT and Claude connect to users’ Coinbase accounts to trade crypto, access data and eventually make payments and purchases autonomously.

items.title: Banking rails are moving past the 'stablecoin winner' narrative: Sygnum
items.summary: Digital asset bank Sygnum says institutional clients want multiple tokenized cash instruments operating interchangeably on a single platform.

items.title: Crypto for Advisors: Crypto ETFs
items.summary: Global crypto ETFs saw significant outflows in May, but diversified exposures showed relative resilience; we explore what the data signals for long-term investors.
